question.content: For the emitter follower with beta=120 and rbe=1.6 kOhm, compute the Q point and dynamic parameters for RL=infinity and RL=3 kOhm. Output exactly ten comma-separated values in the order IBQ_uA,IEQ_mA,UCEQ_V,Au_inf,Aus_inf,Ri_inf_kOhm,Ro_ohm,Au_3k,Aus_3k,Ri_3k_kOhm, plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no percent sign, no fraction, no equation form, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Find Q-point from DC bias, then compute follower gains and resistances under each load case.
step_1.key_point: Find the Q-point from DC bias.

step_3.content: Analyze panel 1 of 2 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_3.key_point: Set up governing relation for the Q point and dynamic parameters for RL=infinity and RL=3 kOhm.

step_5.content: Return all ten values in the defined sequence.
step_5.key_point: Return all ten values in the defined sequence.
